how to stop being betrayed by people you love*:

1. be selective about whom you choose to open your heart to & gift your vulnerability to

*which may or may not include you https://t.co/5QlKpwTeFa

how to stop betraying yourself & others: 

learn how to tell the truth

the trap of betrayal is that it is the ultimate negative-sum game:

📛 you are betraying someone you love (who isn't you) 
📛 you are betraying yourself 
📛 it usually gets worse (more painful & challenging to navigate) with time

a level-set: 

the longer you've been doing/hiding xyz, the more mess there is to clean up—yet in some ways, the mess isn't yours

the mess is how

a) the OP feels & responds when they find out
b) you feel about & navigate their response
c) you feel about the situation as a whole

@daveeed big picture: 

from what I’ve seen & experienced, there are many reasons why people do the things they do

when you understand those reasons, it’s much more difficult to judge them negatively

(… which is a good thing imo!) https://t.co/BPnTEI9dtV

for better or worse… 

it's easy to miss that there are v good reasons for not wanting to face the ways in which you've betrayed someone you love

and that these reasons extend way beyond “wanting to continue to betray your loved one” or “hiding from personal responsibility”

important point:

people who betray the people they love the most are not usually “bad people”

in my experience, they tend to be people who are deeply embedded in patterns of shame, avoidance, and denial

and don't want to blow up their lives

with you, it (I) flows better

there is a softening that happens when I allow myself to be a permission slip

I crack open
I laugh 
I cry 
I am silly 

nothing I thought mattered matters

it is strange, tender, beautiful & ephemeral 

I dance with it daily

I want to be an outpouring of love & devotion, and I am 

I became the person I wanted to be 

I’m allowed to be proud

when I can forgive you, I can forgive myself 

because it was me whose love I wasn't letting in all along

when I can love my humanity, I can love yours 

wholeheartedly, without limits

seeing how I tested you, and smiling sweetly

seeing how I test you, present tense, and being unapologetic about it 

seeing how you saw me before I saw myself 

loving my softness & hardness all at once

seeing that I can trust my feelings, and they have much to teach me 

seeing also that I can trust you 

I could always trust you

seeing with love

seeing that it doesn't matter anymore

seeing that love is all we have

seeing that all that matters is how it feels, and trusting that
suspending punctuation with my disbelief; realising (again) that sensemaking is overrated; seeing with my real eyes

sometimes I think about the depth of my love for you, and I’m like, “fuck, idk how you cope with it. I’m not sure I could”

and then, “how the fuck did this happen? it doesn't make any sense”

my favourite thing in the world is writing anonymous love letters to you on the internet 

isn't that insane?

where there's a will, there's a way

where there’s a heart, there's a place 
for beautiful things to grow & change

sometimes sacrifice looks like 

“I don't mind being wrong about everything I ever thought to be true 

if it means we can be happy together”

one of the greatest things in the world 
is experiencing someone you didn't expect to have the capacity or desire to listen to you 

prove you wrong

… and what I don't know, I will discover. in perfect timing. with perfect grace. with perfect ease. 

in Love’s warm, boundless, effortless embrace.

the truth of my own nature, and the truth of our insatiable & unmistakable belonging.

we are connected. and we are what we have…

all I want to do & be is love more deeply & powerfully than ever before. 

I believe my love can transform the world. 

I know & love myself.

love is a gift, and simple, and precious, and beautiful. 

love is available to us all always. 

love is pure presence x potentiality. 

love is the way we dance in the moonlight & drink in the morning sun.

I want the way I love to give people hope. bc hey— the way I love gives ME so much hope. the way I love gives me ENDLESS hope. there is more than enough love to go around in the world. we all are & can be radically loveable & wildly devotional w/o treading on each other’s toes.

you inspire me more than I can put into words. 

you inspire me more than I do. 

you have had to fight harder than I ever will. 

you are the biggest-hearted man I've ever met. 

no matter what, I will always love you. 

I know that you know that too.

I want my entire life to be a book of love poems. 

I want my being to be an outpouring of devotion to & appreciation of the world. 

I want to be everything I already am, and more. 

I am becoming her. 

I feel safe, held & warm.

I've never met anyone like you, and you've never met anyone like me. 

I hear that often, and with you it's different. 

you really see me. 
you really feel me. 
you really know me. 

that's really special to (and for) me.

when you make love into war, love can never win. 

when love is warlike in nature, it makes sense that we learn & enact psychological defences. 

these words reverberate in my brain. 

there were no faults in our stars.

I'm at an inflection point, and I savour each & every moment. 

we’ve swapped places: I think it's time for you to be my catalyst.

that's different for me, and I'm down for that.

everything has its time, place & rightful place. it makes sense. there is nothing to fight anymore.

love is simple and pure when you cut out the noise.

… and when you cut out the noise, you can truly feel.

being able to feel is being able to truly live & embrace the glory of this life— the glory of being alive. the beauty, wonder and magic of every[day] life experiences.

your ability to hold me now, and hold space for me now, inspires me. I take credit for some of it, but not all of it. I was the catalyst, undoubtedly, and… you did this too. you chose this too. and you did so, so, so much without me. I love you, and I'm so proud of you.

the biggest thing I've learned recently is [how] not to rush myself. I can be with, circulate, and ground an amount of energy that previously would’ve engulfed me. I know I yearn for dissolution & I know how to root that energy in me first. I know I will never lose myself again.

there is so much innocence in my own becoming, too. the shedding of skins, layers, identities & pretensions. I feel solid in myself in a way that I couldn’t have felt a yr or two ago bc I didn't have the lived experience to back it up. this is what I mean when I say that learning…

I believe that some people come into our lives to teach us things that are or would be impossible to explain. I believe that I am divinely guided & led. I believe that life is a crazy psychedelic simulation-cum-vortex. I'm grateful to be as young as I am & know as much as I know.

I want to talk about you & I.  

I don't talk much about us because it’s too precious to me to put on display. 

but it’s important to me and you're important to me and sometimes I need to speak. 

so, I will.
I love coming home to love & belonging.

I love how deeply desire grips me. I love the clarity it inspires in me. I love connecting more deeply with my own heart, soul, fire & longing. I love seeing, feeling & experiencing myself coming home to myself in new ways. I love this journey of endless becoming.

I believe we all know what we want. I believe we have no say in what we want. I believe that desire moves [through] and transforms us when we allow ourselves to be guided by its—and our—innate wisdom. I love my desire. I love my desires. I love their specificity & grace.

I believe in my ability to create & achieve everything I’ve ever dreamed of, and so much more. so much more. my, your, our potential is boundless when we know what we want & we are willing to feel everything along the way.

I want to live in a world where it's safe to feel, and pain is neither glorified nor feared or bypassed. I want. I feel. there is a simplicity & truth to this that will always be present that I too am present with. I aspire to never lose this.
life is humbling. feelings are humbling. life is beautiful. everything hurts, and it’s the best kind of pain. I don't expect or require you to understand it.
